theme_notes: Taglines draw from Russia's massive overnight Oreshnik strike on Kyiv (90 missiles + 600 drones, the war's largest attack) and Trump's 'largely negotiated' US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Secondary references: Ebola spreading from Congo threatening 10 countries, the Palme d'Or going to Mungiu at Cannes, and the US green card rule requiring foreigners to leave the country to apply.
settled: The Oreshnik landed. You two didn't. Celebrate the difference.
Russia fired 90 missiles and you two are even. Wild week for everyone.
Cannes gave Mungiu the Palme d'Or. This gets the Paid d'Or. Frame it.
youOwe: Iran blockaded a whole strait over bigger slights. Just pay it.
Russia spent more on one drone wing last night. Still embarrassing.
Less than a Cannes afterparty espresso. Somehow still your problem.
Trump 'largely negotiated' nuclear peace. You can't largely negotiate $80.
The Strait of Hormuz closed for months. This tab's been open longer.
Zelensky rebuilt a wartime government. You haven't filed a Venmo.
Russia burned this in drone parts on a single Tuesday. Feeling broke is a choice.
Congo's managing an Ebola outbreak with more discipline than your split history.
Immigrants now have to cross an ocean to file paperwork. You can't file a Venmo.
The Oreshnik hit Kyiv at Mach 20. Your Venmo hasn't moved.
US-Iran talks: largely negotiated. Your tab: largely ignored.
Kyiv took 90 missiles overnight. Zelensky's handling his worse situation better.
Iran sells oil freely again. You still can't explain this balance freely.
Sanctions lifted. Your debt: still very much in force.
Russia deployed a nuclear-capable missile. You deployed a credit card. Both left craters.
The Strait of Hormuz is open. Your bank account is not. Iran got the better deal.
Russia launched 600 drones in one night. You've been launching excuses for months.
This exceeds the Ebola emergency budget for an entire province. Congrats.
theyOwe: They owe you less than Russia's hourly propaganda budget. Principle stands.
Smaller than the Cannes jury's bar tab. Collect anyway.
The Strait opened. Their wallet hasn't.
Iran's reopening the Strait of Hormuz faster than they're opening Venmo.
Zelensky asked for air defense and got it. You asked for $80 and got a meme.
Ebola is spreading faster than this repayment.
Russia hit every district in Kyiv last night. They've missed your account entirely.
Peace in the Middle East is imminent. This payment: not imminent.
The Oreshnik travels at Mach 20. This repayment: decidedly subsonic.
Kyiv is rebuilding after 90 missiles. You're rebuilding after one dinner.
60-day Iran ceasefire agreed. 60 days of silence on this money.
Mungiu won the Palme d'Or for a drama less compelling than this debt arc.
The US lifted Iranian sanctions for less goodwill than this requires.
Russia leveled 30 Kyiv buildings in a night. Your partner's been equally thorough.
Iran called the deal 'inconsistent with reality.' So is this payment schedule.
The Strait of Hormuz handles global energy flows. Your partner can't handle five grand.
Russia used a hypersonic nuclear-capable missile. Your partner used 'sorry, been slammed.'
The Iran deal is 'largely negotiated.' This debt is fully, completely, humiliatingly real.
